name: Stuffed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the potatoes.
2. Bake at 400°F until crisp and about 45 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and let cool.
4. Slice each potato in half lengthwise and scoop out the pulp, keeping the shells intact.
5. Mash the pulp with a fork or beater.
6. Slowly add butter to the mashed pulp, then sour cream and milk.
7. Add chopped onions and pepper to taste.
8. Beat until fluffy.
9. Spoon the mixture back into the potato shells.
10. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
11. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
